Prof. Richard Pena from Columbia University was a guest at KHAS

Prof. Pena, who has been the director of the New York Film Festival for many years in addition to his academic studies in the field of cinema, organized a three-day workshop as a guest of our Department of Radio, Television and Cinema.

In the workshop titled “Hidden from History: Three American Women Directors”, in addition to Prof. Pena’s presentations, film screenings, question-answer and discussion sessions, different periods of American Cinema were discussed from the perspective of women directors.

We would like to thank Professor Richard Pena and all workshop participants.
